title: Campaign Evolved proves that the first Halo adventure is still fun to play 25 years later
summary: Halo: Campaign Evolved is a safe yet surprisingly competent remake of Halo: Combat Evolved that attempts to bring back the glory days. But when actually playing Campaign Evolved , I came to appreciate the gameplay iterations that came with later Halo games.
